# AI Chat Reporting — Vars

Var definitions are derived from `module.lowdefy.yaml`. Pass these via the `vars:` block in your app's `lowdefy.yaml` entry for this module.

## Summary

| Name | Type | Default | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `datasets` | array |  | Yes | The data dictionary — a declarative description of queryable datasets (dimensions, measures, types, allowed aggregations, roles). Feeds the agent's instructions at build time and is the allowlist the query builder validates every spec against. A dimension/measure may set an author-declared `field` (a dotted path into an embedded sub-document, defaulting to its id), and a date dimension may set `bucket` (year\|month\|week\|day) for time-series grouping. For arrays, object-arrays and cross-collection joins, point a dataset's source.collection at a read-only MongoDB view — see the "reporting over complex data" guide.  |
| `reports_collection` | string | `report_layouts` |  | Collection name for saved report specs. |
| `conversations_collection` | string | `conversations` |  | Collection name for chat conversations. |
| `model` | string | `anthropic/claude-sonnet-4.5` |  | Gateway model id (provider/model) for the reporting assistant, e.g. anthropic/claude-sonnet-4.5 or anthropic/claude-haiku-4.5.  |
